meaning: n.州,行政区(尤指瑞士的州,法国的区)vt.驻扎,划成行政区
examples: Canton Fair is a platform for import and export mainly.
We got dressed and walked to Canton Tower.
My little daughter looked out at the lights of Canton Tower and said she wanted to go outside.
In the southern Ticino canton, plans to replicate the success of Swiss National Park are well advanced.
Sam drove to nearby Canton, where he visited a sporting-goods store and purchased a twelve-gauge shotgun.
